title: Padikkadha Pakkangal
overview: In Yercaud, a heroine visiting for a shoot clashes with a fake reporter who confesses to blackmailing women. Seeking revenge for her sister's murder, she takes evidence from him, kills him, and delivers it to the police. The evidence implicates many in similar crimes, leading to a government crackdown.
